estimand.condition_primary_definition: sample-weighted mean over deep union first_post within condition
estimand.phase_aggregation: arithmetic mean of four condition-level phase NMSEs within each cell
estimand.reference_selection: GRU/SSM identity selected once per task-seed on overall heldout prior NMSE

descriptive_secondary.registration_status: condition and phase metrics were frozen secondary reports; these decompositions reuse the registered reference and bootstrap policies but define no confirmation gate
